title: High-Value Customers
text: High-value customers are in the top segment of predicted CLV and contribute a disproportionately large share of total revenue.

title: Medium-Value Customers
text: Medium-value customers represent the largest growth opportunity and can be upgraded with engagement strategies.

title: Low-Value Customers
text: Low-value customers are new or inactive and are targeted with activation campaigns.

title: RFM Model
text: The RFM model evaluates recency, frequency, and monetary value to summarize customer behaviour.

title: Customer Base Overview
text: The dataset contains 100000 customers. High-value customers represent 34.0%, Medium-value customers 33.0%, Low-value customers 33.0%.

title: High-Value Customers
text: High-value customers are in the top 34% of predicted CLV and contribute roughly 60% of total revenue. They typically show high frequency, high spend, and long tenure.

title: Medium-Value Customers
text: Medium-value customers represent the largest growth opportunity. They can be upgraded through targeted offers and loyalty programs.

title: Low-Value Customers
text: Low-value customers are often new or inactive. Activation strategies focus on onboarding, incentives, and engagement nudges.

title: RFM Model
text: RFM evaluates customers using Recency, Frequency, and Monetary value to classify them into champions, loyal, and at-risk segments.

title: Marketing Budget Strategy
text: Recommended marketing budget allocation is 50% for high-value retention, 35% for medium-value upgrades, and 15% for low-value activation.

title: Global Customer Statistics
text: Total customers in dataset: 100000. High-value customers: 34000. Medium-value customers: 33000. Low-value customers: 33000.

title: High-Value Customer Statistics
text: High-value customers count 34000. Average CLV is $1352. Average frequency is 13.2 per month. Average recency is 85 days.

title: Medium-Value Customer Statistics
text: Medium-value customers count 33000. Average CLV is $219. Average frequency is 8.8 per month. Average recency is 100 days.

title: Low-Value Customer Statistics
text: Low-value customers count 33000. Average CLV is $48. Average frequency is 6.7 per month. Average recency is 106 days.
